app.title: Smart Workbench
app.agentNotReady: Built-in assistant engine is not ready. Restart the app; for development use npm run start:dev.
drop.title: Drop files here to upload
sidebar.emptyWorkspace: No workspace yet. Click + above to add a folder
composer.placeholder: What would you like to ask?
composer.placeholderPermission: Waiting for your approval — use Approve or Deny above
composer.sessionSkillsHint: When not customized, global skills from Settings apply.
composer.placeholderWithProject: Folder: {name}. What would you like to ask?
composer.placeholderEmpty: Add a folder first, then start chatting.
settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Changes menus and prompts. Does not change chat language.
settings.modelDesc: Choose a preset or add a custom model. API connection maps to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN in the default config.
settings.modelApiDesc: Built-in mode uses the app gateway. Custom mode sets an Anthropic-compatible base URL and key for all built-in presets.
settings.modelApiKeyHint: Saved key: {hint} (leave blank to keep unchanged)
settings.modelCustomDesc: Add providers such as Qwen or GLM. Configure API plus Haiku/Sonnet/Opus tiers; blanks inherit the main model or global API above.
settings.modelTierDesc: Model tiers (optional): blank fields use the main model. Subagents default to the Haiku model.
settings.modelCustomBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave blank to use global API
settings.modelCustomApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to use global API
settings.permissionDesc: How the assistant confirms tool use. Takes effect on the next send.
settings.searchDesc: Search engine for web lookups. Applies to new chats after switching.
settings.searxngHint: Custom SearXNG is preferred when set; otherwise built-in public instances are tried.
settings.skillsDesc: Manage assistant skills. Built-in GitHub catalog included; override with a custom registry.json.
toast.modelBusy: A reply is in progress. Try again later to switch models.
toast.modelSwitchFailed: Failed to switch model. Please retry.
toast.modelApiInvalidBaseUrl: Invalid API URL; must start with http:// or https://
toast.modelApiInvalidKey: Enter a valid API key (8–512 characters)
toast.permissionBusySession: A chat is busy. Try again later to switch permissions.
toast.permissionBusy: A reply is in progress. Try again later to switch permissions.
toast.permissionSwitchFailed: Failed to switch permission mode. Please retry.
toast.sessionBusy: This chat is still processing the last message.
toast.searchBusy: A chat is busy. Try again later to switch search.
toast.searchSwitchFailed: Failed to switch search engine. Please retry.
toast.searchSaveBusy: A chat is busy. Try again later to save.
toast.searchUrlInvalid: Invalid URL. Use http:// or https://
toast.searchUrlCleared: Custom instance cleared; using built-in public instances
toast.sessionSkillsBusy: This chat is busy. Try again later to change skills.
toast.selectSession: Select or create a chat first.
toast.skillsCheckBusy: A chat is busy. Try again later to check updates.
toast.skillsRefreshBusy: A chat is busy. Try again later to refresh.
toast.skillsNeedRegistry: Configure and save a skill registry URL first
send.error.NO_CLI: Assistant engine not ready. Quit and reopen the app.
send.error.NO_PROJECT: This chat's folder no longer exists. Pick a folder or create a new chat.
send.error.INVALID_WORKDIR: Working directory missing. Check the folder path on the left.
send.error.BUSY: Still processing the last message. Try again later.
send.error.RUNNER_ERROR: Failed to start assistant process. Restart the app.
send.error.FILES_UNAVAILABLE: Attachments from the original message are no longer available.
prompt.sessionLabel: Name this chat so you can find it later
prompt.projectLabel: Display name in the list (does not rename the folder on disk)
message.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while handling the request.
permission.approvePlanTitle: Plan ready — waiting for your approval
permission.approvePlanDesc: After approval, the assistant will leave plan mode and start executing.
permission.approveRemember: Approve and remember (skip future prompts for this tool)
permission.respondFailed: Could not submit approval. Please try again.
permission.timeout: Approval has been waiting a while — please approve or deny.
skills.registryHintCustom: Enter a registry.json URL and click Check updates. Leave empty for the built-in GitHub catalog.
skills.registryHintBundled: Built-in GitHub catalog (offline install, no GitHub access needed)
errors.BUSY: A chat is busy. Please try again later.
errors.NETWORK: Cannot reach skill registry. Check network or URL.
errors.NETWORK_DETAIL: Bundled skill pack missing and GitHub unreachable. Update the app or retry later.
errors.BUNDLED_MISSING: Bundled skill pack missing. Please update the app.
errors.INVALID_URL: Invalid URL. Use http:// or https://
errors.BUNDLED_PROTECTED: Built-in skills cannot be overwritten remotely.
fileErrors.FILE_NOT_FOUND: File not found or path invalid.
fileErrors.UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Unsupported file type. Images, PDF, Word, text, etc. are supported.
fileErrors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File exceeds 20MB limit. Compress and retry.
model.pro.label: DeepSeek Pro
model.flash.label: DeepSeek Flash
permission.default.label: Default
permission.acceptEdits.label: Auto-review edits
permission.acceptEdits.desc: Auto-approve file edits; other actions still confirm.
permission.bypassPermissions.label: Full access
permission.bypassPermissions.desc: Read/write files and run commands without prompts.
search.provider.iqs.label: Alibaba IQS
search.provider.iqs.desc: Stable domestic search, built into the app.
search.provider.searxng.label: SearXNG
search.provider.searxng.desc: Open meta-search, no tracking, no API key.
search.provider.duckduckgo.label: DuckDuckGo
search.provider.duckduckgo.desc: Direct DuckDuckGo Lite, no API key.
diff.title: File Changes
